subcodes.first_line: O thou who wanderest through the lands and art cast out among the servants in the path of God, the Lord of the Day of Judgment! Art thou grieved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها السائر فی البلاد و المطرود بین العباد فی سبیل الله مالک یوم المعاد هل یحزنک
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
